purpose: Return structured, scope-bound subagent output without allowing prose or child status to become enterprise truth.

field_contract.schema_ref: Versioned JSON Schema or equivalent contract used to validate the payload.
field_contract.payload_hash: sha256 of a sanitized structured payload; raw hidden reasoning is never stored.
field_contract.artifact_refs: Workspace-relative or governed logical references, never unrestricted content copies.
field_contract.parent_action_id: The parent Action Receipt that authorized this child call.
field_contract.child_work_node_id: A new Work Node id when the child performs independent work; it is never the parent node id.

scope_rules.child_grant: Child Grant is issued by the Broker and is a strict subset of the parent Grant.

invariants: A returned or accepted_for_review result is not verification evidence by itself.
A child cannot write directly to the parent Work Node state.
A prose-only result without schema validation is rejected before parent synthesis.
Result correction creates a new result_id and preserves the prior result reference.
